summary.created: {actor} created an order for {customer} at {branch} for {required} EGP.
summary.confirmed: {actor} confirmed the order for {customer} at {branch} for {required} EGP.
summary.collection_recorded: {actor} recorded a collection of {amount} EGP on the order for {customer}.
summary.collection_refunded: {actor} refunded {amount} EGP on the order for {customer} after cancellation.
